case_title: DR. MICHAEL DUMAS VS. SUSAN KENNEY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUMAS, DR. MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KENNEY, SUSAN $1,196.69 PRINCIPAL, $283.80 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,510.49, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
